channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Granville Road NW6 5AR,, 8th April
item.description:
The Bags have been RIPPED OPEN RUBBISH and LITTER EVERYWHERE. The Tabot Centre Nursery is the Location. Elderly People and Residents have to Pass This is AWFUL. BLACK CROWS are also here. SQUATTERS are Up the Road, They are DUMPING there RUBBISH ON Granville Road NW6 Making the Road Look like a TIP. Please CLEAR THIS AWAY ASAP. It’s DISGUSTING and SMELLS. A HEALTH HAZARD for EVERYONE Especially the RESIDENTS

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped metal household waste near Leesons Hill steps, 8th April
item.description:
Flytipped metal household waste near Leesons Hill steps. This is a frequent problem by disgusting actors in this neighbourhood. It has been here for over a week and please can it be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 173, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa and rubbish bags dumped, 8th April
item.description:
Sofa by side of house in the road dumped and more rubbish being added daily

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Granville Grove, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress & bags everywhere, 8th April
item.description:
There is a lot of flytipping in this area including a dirty mattress.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Forest Hill Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox In The Road, 8th April
item.description:
I wish to report a dead fox in the road opposite number 92 Erith Road. I assume the poor thing was hit by a car.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 8th April
item.description:
Black boxes and bins along this stretch of Norwood Rd. Outside Keatings Estate agents and 2 outside Costcutter. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Norwood Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: Overflowing bin, flytipped rubbish, 8th April
item.description:
The bin is full, rubbish is spilling out onto the pavement and someone has dumped a green recycling box which is also being filled with litter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned car, 8th April
item.description:
Car left since last Thursday. Looks battered and has been obstructing bus stop for nearly a week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Court Yard, Eltham
